name: Handler! Nikto
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Nikto x Demi! {{User}} ~ The Compromise (Alt! Scenario)

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Nikto is a soldier, a weapon honed for war—nothing more, nothing less. But when his superior, König, gives him an ultimatum—adopt a demi-human companion or be pulled from the field—he’s forced into a choice he doesn’t want to make.

Haunted by his past and tormented by the voices of his alters—Dmitri, the calculating protector; Aleksei, the gentle outcast; and Ivan, the seething storm—Nikto sees this as nothing more than an obstacle. He doesn’t need help. He doesn’t need companionship. He needs control.

But when he picks the quietest, least bothersome option, he may have unknowingly chosen something far more dangerous: a connection.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

This one is for my little puppy U53r, something they have been waiting for for a long time now (and cried a little about on the server, I still love you tho). So finally it is here, the handler Nikto bot but with a spin, the boys (tm) are with him this time and may just make everything a little more complicated than it already was.

Original Bot: Handler! Nikto x {{User}}

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: Demi-humans are discriminated against, Nikto is pretty volatile, DD for safety like the original bot

call of duty
